channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Billposting
item.description: Makes it possible to pin parchments to wall and display their contents in-world. Now with formatting

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: Equus: Medieval Horses
item.description: Adds a medieval warhorse to the game that can be purchased from a new horse trader

item.title: Jaunt: Entity Movement System
item.description: Library providing an extended entity riding system with additional control patterns and stamina

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: The Gravestones Mod - 1.22.3
item.description: Adds a gravestone which stores the players inventory upon death and can be retrieved by them later.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Woodsman
item.description: Realistic tree felling — whole trees topple over, then the stumps grow back.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Animalica - Hooved Animals
item.description: Adds all the hooved animals as playable models!

item.title: IndustrialStory
item.description: Overhauls metalworking, chemistry, and glassworking.

item.title: Anthro Players
item.description: Anthro animal models for the player

item.title: Animalica - Small & Odd
item.description: Adds the small goober animals like raccoons, chickens, and rabbits as players

item.title: Desert Tweaks
item.description: small set of tweaks for a desert survival server

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Flower Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing/farming flowers!

item.title: Temporal Relics
item.description: Adds randomized affixes to found equipment, introducing mundane, corrupted, and temporally enhanced

item.title: Animalica - Bears
item.description: Adds Bears as player choices

item.title: Combat Durability Multipliers
item.description: Configurable durability multipliers for weapons and armors.

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Age of Seraphs Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for the Age of Seraphs server that were too small to make into their own mods

item.title: Bricked Up + Expanded Matter Compatibility
item.description: Adds a recipe to convert Bricked Up powderized stones into Expanded Matter crushed stones

item.title: TLNetworks
item.description: Automatically records translocator connections and draws lines on the world map.

item.title: Renderer Mangler
item.description: Custom cubemap renderer with different projections that allows up to 360 FOV

item.title: Advanced Geology
item.description: Adds new, realistic ores and stones with heavy IOG compatibility

item.title: Aethernis Towns
item.description: Automatic towns from nearby claims with seasons, territory, and Discord governance.

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: Block Overlay
item.description: The best x-ray mod so far 🎉

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Bixo
item.description: Creatures for Maltiez's Player Model Lib!
